## JSON Schema Options


#### liveUpdate

<Code>{`liveUpdate?: boolean;`}</Code>


if value should update on each keystroke instead of on blur. Defaults to false

#### showHeader

<Code>{`showHeader?: boolean;`}</Code>


if false, will hide title. will hide complete title-header if no menu-actions are available
#### widgetMenuItems

<Code>{`widgetMenuItems?: WidgetMenuItems;`}</Code>


internal option for menu action items
### Referenced from `DefaultNodeOptions`

#### classNames

if changes to this data point are disabled

<Code>{`placeholder?: string;`}</Code>


if supported, will add a placeholder for the input element

<Code>{`hidden: boolean;`}</Code>


if this data point should be hidden from display

<Code>{`title?: string;`}</Code>


title of this data point
#### readOnly

<Code>{`readOnly?: boolean;`}</Code>


disable edit of form, but allow selection and copy of value

<Code>{`required?: boolean;`}</Code>


flag data as required (visual only)
